rule_name: Broken Access Control - Path Traversal Attempt
description: Detects directory traversal attempts to access sensitive OS files (excluding log and config files).
search_query: index=main sourcetype=_json _index_earliest=-1m ("*..%2f*" OR "*../*" OR "*/etc/shadow*" OR "*/etc/passwd*" OR "*/windows/win.ini*") NOT ("*.log*" OR "*/var/log/*" OR "*/.env*")
